_comment: Folio legal docs manifest. App fetches this on launch to know latest version. Bump version + summary when ToS/Privacy changes.

terms.summary_zh: v2.5：新增「停權通知與申訴」段（DSA 對齊）、揭露 OAuth 識別碼雜湊保留機制（防止規避停權重複註冊、5 年）
terms.summary_en: v2.5: Added 'Suspension Notice & Appeal' section (DSA-aligned), disclosing OAuth identifier hash retention for ban-evasion prevention (5 years)

privacy.summary_zh: v2.5：保留期限清單新增「停權雜湊識別碼」條目（與條款新章對應、5 年、解 ban 即時移除）
privacy.summary_en: v2.5: Added 'suspension-evasion hash' retention entry to the retention list (mirrors new Terms section, 5 years, removed on unban)
